framework.vite_integration: native ESM support, zero-config for React 19

phase_4.name: Rate Limiting & Performance
coverage: per-key rate limiting with in-memory counter enforcement
rate limit enforcement (allows N, 429s on N+1)
per-key independence (separate counters per lobster key)

app_factory.schema_initialization: All CREATE TABLE statements from src/server/db.ts
app_factory.dependency_injection: req.db = test db via middleware, routes use fallback pattern

authentication_tests.expiration_handling: Expired tokens return 401, auto-delete on next lookup
authentication_tests.type_gates: human vs lobster key type enforcement (requireHuman, requirePermission)

data_isolation_tests.cross_user_access: User A cannot read/modify/delete User B's notes (404 on direct access)
data_isolation_tests.list_filtering: GET endpoints filter by user_uuid in WHERE clause
data_isolation_tests.cascading_deletes: User deletion → cascade to notes + api_tokens + lobster_keys via FK constraints

security: Token entropy (base62 length 32 for session tokens)
Constant-time comparison (query-based hash matching, no timing oracle)
Expired token cleanup (scheduled deletion from api_tokens)
Permission JSON validation (no injection via stored JSON)
Cross-user data boundary enforcement (sqlquery filtering by user_uuid)
correctness: Agent key revocation sets is_active=0 (subsequent auth fails)
Permission object correctly parsed and enforced
Lobster key without canWrite blocked from PUT/PATCH operations

test_execution.command_run: npm test (vitest run, exit after completion)
test_execution.command_watch: npm run test:watch (vitest, re-run on file change)
test_execution.command_coverage: npm run test:coverage (vitest run --coverage, generate v8 report)
test_execution.pre_commit: All tests must pass before commit (>147 tests PASS)
test_execution.current_status: 147 tests passing across 10 files (Phase 1+2+3+4 complete, enhanced rate limiting coverage)
